full_response:
The tensor components are computed by taking the product \(-6 v^a u^b\) for each pair of indices \(a, b = 0, 1, 2, 3\). Given \(v^a = (5, -1, 0, 1)\) and \(u^b = (-2, 1, 1, -6)\), the resulting tensor is:

\[
-6v^a u^b = \begin{pmatrix}
60 & -30 & -30 & 180 \\
-12 & 6 & 6 & -36 \\
0 & 0 & 0 & 0 \\
12 & -6 & -6 & 36
\end{pmatrix}.
\]

\boxed{\begin{pmatrix} 60 & -30 & -30 & 180 \\ -12 & 6 & 6 & -36 \\ 0 & 0 & 0 & 0 \\ 12 & -6 & -6 & 36 \end{pmatrix}}

Confidence: 100%
